stories.name: Slack invitation link

acceptance_criteria.when: they are added to the Slack workspace

stories.description: When a founder finishes the intake questionnaire the platform must automatically provision a Slack workspace invitation and send it via email. This story implements the backend service that creates the invite and stores the link for later retrieval.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want a Slack community so that I can engage with peers and share referrals.
risks: Slack API rate limits may delay invitation delivery
stories.testing_notes: Run integration test against a test Slack workspace; verify email contains a valid invite URL.

stories.name: Slack introductions posting

acceptance_criteria.when: they post a message in the #introductions channel
acceptance_criteria.then: other members can view and respond

stories.description: Implement the UI component that allows a founder to post an introduction message in the designated Slack channel and ensure the message is broadcast to all channel members.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want a Slack community so that I can engage with peers and share referrals.
risks: Message formatting may break on mobile clients
stories.testing_notes: Verify that a posted message appears in the channel and that other users can react.

stories.name: Create discussion thread

acceptance_criteria.when: a community forum page is created

stories.description: Add a UI page within the Slack integration that lists available community forums and enables a founder to create a new discussion thread for a specific industry or referral interest.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want structured community spaces so that I can discuss partnership opportunities.
stories.testing_notes: Create a thread via API and verify it appears in the forum list.

stories.name: Thread comment notifications
stories.description: Implement notification logic that triggers a Slack direct message to all participants of a thread whenever a new comment is posted.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want structured community spaces so that I can discuss partnership opportunities.
stories.testing_notes: Post a comment via API and assert that a notification message is delivered to each participant.

stories.name: Store questionnaire data

acceptance_criteria.given: a founder accesses the intake page
acceptance_criteria.then: the system stores their profile data

stories.description: Create the backend endpoint that receives the questionnaire payload, validates it, and persists the founder's profile in the Supabase database.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want an intake questionnaire so that I can provide the information needed to find complementary partners.
risks: Data validation errors could block onboarding
stories.testing_notes: Submit a valid questionnaire payload and verify a row appears in the profiles table.

stories.name: Intake confirmation email

acceptance_criteria.then: the founder receives a confirmation email

stories.description: Add email sending logic using Resend (or similar) to notify the founder that their intake has been successfully recorded.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want an intake questionnaire so that I can provide the information needed to find complementary partners.
risks: Email delivery failures may reduce user confidence
stories.testing_notes: Mock email service and assert that an email payload is generated upon successful questionnaire submission.

stories.name: Generate partner shortlist

acceptance_criteria.then: a list of up to three complementary partners is presented

stories.description: Implement the matching algorithm that analyses intake profiles and returns up to three partner suggestions based on shared customer segments.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want algorithmic pairing so that I receive relevant partner suggestions.
risks: Algorithm performance may exceed time budget
stories.testing_notes: Feed synthetic profiles into the engine and verify that the returned partners share at least one target customer segment.

stories.name: Send introduction request

acceptance_criteria.given: a list of matches is shown
acceptance_criteria.then: an introduction request is sent to the partner

stories.description: Create the service that, upon founder selection, sends an email (or Slack message) to the chosen partner inviting them to a referral conversation.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want algorithmic pairing so that I receive relevant partner suggestions.
risks: Partner may ignore the introduction request
stories.testing_notes: Mock partner endpoint and verify that a request payload is sent when a founder selects a match.

stories.name: View referral guide

acceptance_criteria.given: a founder accesses the education section
acceptance_criteria.then: they see an overview of referral steps

stories.description: Add a static page under the education section that displays the referral guide content, including step‑by‑step instructions and visual aids.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want an introductory referral guide so that I understand how to structure a referral partnership.
stories.testing_notes: Render the guide page and verify that all expected sections are present.

stories.name: Self‑assessment after guide

acceptance_criteria.then: they receive a personalised next‑step recommendation

stories.description: Implement an interactive questionnaire at the end of the guide that evaluates the founder's readiness and suggests the next action (e.g., request a match, schedule a call).
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want an introductory referral guide so that I understand how to structure a referral partnership.
risks: Assessment logic may give irrelevant recommendations
stories.testing_notes: Submit sample answers and verify that the returned recommendation matches expected logic.

stories.name: Generate referral template

acceptance_criteria.given: a founder wants to draft a referral agreement

stories.description: Create a service that merges selected template data with founder‑specific details to produce a ready‑to‑send referral agreement document.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want referral templates so that I can quickly create partnership agreements.
risks: Template placeholders may not be replaced correctly
stories.testing_notes: Select each template and verify that the generated document contains the founder's name and company details.

stories.name: Share referral template

acceptance_criteria.when: the founder shares it with a partner
acceptance_criteria.then: the partner can accept or suggest edits

stories.description: Implement sharing functionality that sends the generated template to the partner via email (or Slack) and provides a simple UI for the partner to accept or propose changes.
stories.user_story: As a founder, I want referral templates so that I can quickly create partnership agreements.
risks: Partner may not receive the shared document due to email filtering
stories.testing_notes: Mock partner receipt and verify that the acceptance UI reflects the partner's response.
